input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret es-http-tls -o jsonpath='{.data.ca\.crt}' | base64 -d > /tmp/ca.crt
kubectl -n elasticsearch cp /tmp/ca.crt curl-test:/tmp/ca.crt 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "--- transforms ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_transform?pretty"
echo "--- transform stats ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_transform/_all/_stats?pretty"

date -d @1783645847 -u
date -u
echo "---node roles---"
PW=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_nodes?filter_path=nodes.*.roles,nodes.*.name&pretty"
echo "---cluster settings---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cluster/settings?include_defaults=true&filter_path=**.transform&pretty"

kubectl -n elasticsearch get all -o wide
echo "--- sts es resources ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].resources}'; echo
echo "--- recent events ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch get events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -40

input.command:
echo "=== es-cluster StatefulSet ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es-cluster -o yaml
echo "=== es-transform StatefulSet ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get statefulset es-transform -o yaml

content.content:
=== es-cluster StatefulSet ===
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"es-cluster","namespace":"elasticsearch"},"spec":{"podManagementPolicy":"Parallel","replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"es-cluster"}},"serviceName":"es-cluster","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"es-cluster"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"env":[{"name":"POD_NAME","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.name"}}},{"name":"ES_JAVA_OPTS","value":"-Xms512m -Xmx512m"}],"image":"docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.9","name":"elasticsearch","ports":[{"containerPort":9200,"name":"http"},{"containerPort":9300,"name":"transport"}],"readinessProbe":{"failureThreshold":6,"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5,"tcpSocket":{"port":9200},"timeoutSeconds":1},"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"2Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml","name":"es-config","subPath":"elasticsearch.yml"},{"mountPath":"/usr/share/elasticsearch/data","name":"data"}]}],"volumes":[{"configMap":{"items":[{"key":"elasticsearch.yml","path":"elasticsearch.yml"}],"name":"es-config"},"name":"es-config"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"5Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:07:17Z"
  generation: 1
  name: es-cluster
  namespace: elasticsearch
  resourceVersion: "28349"
  uid: 47f0dc74-c40d-4b1a-8e96-d2a982ecb934
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: Parallel
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: es-cluster
  serviceName: es-cluster
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: es-cluster
    spec:
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
          value: -Xms512m -Xmx512m
        image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.9
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: elasticsearch
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9200
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9300
          name: transport
          protocol: TCP
        readinessProbe:
          failureThreshold: 6
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 5
          successThreshold: 1
          tcpSocket:
            port: 9200
          timeoutSeconds: 1
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: "1"
            memory: 2Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
          name: es-config
          subPath: elasticsearch.yml
        - mountPath: /usr/share/elasticsearch/data
          name: data
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          items:
          - key: elasticsearch.yml
            path: elasticsearch.yml
          name: es-config
        name: es-config
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 5Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending
status:
  availableReplicas: 0
  collisionCount: 0
  currentReplicas: 3
  currentRevision: es-cluster-5f9b5d9cdf
  observedGeneration: 1
  replicas: 3
  updateRevision: es-cluster-5f9b5d9cdf
  updatedReplicas: 3
=== es-transform StatefulSet ===
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "--- tasks ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_tasks?actions=*transform*&pretty"
echo "--- node stats (transform) ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_transform/events-by-service/_stats?pretty" | tail -40
echo "--- thread pool ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_cat/thread_pool/*?v" | grep -Ei "transform|name"
kubectl -n elasticsearch logs es-0 --since=20m 2>/dev/null | grep -i transform | tail -60

kubectl -n elasticsearch logs es-cluster-0 --tail=60
echo "=== configmap for es-cluster ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get cm es-config -o yaml 2>&1
echo "=== configmap for es-transform ==="
kubectl -n elasticsearch get cm es-transform-config -o yaml 2>&1

=== configmap for es-cluster ===
apiVersion: v1
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    network.host: 0.0.0.0

    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-transport
    cluster.initial_master_nodes:
      - es-0
      - es-1
      - es-2

    xpack.security.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.key: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate_authorities:
      - /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt

    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.key: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate_authorities:
      - /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt

apiVersion: v1
data:
  elasticsearch.yml: |
    cluster.name: es-cluster
    network.host: 0.0.0.0

    discovery.seed_hosts:
      - es-transport
    cluster.initial_master_nodes:
      - es-0
      - es-1
      - es-2

    xpack.security.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.http.ssl.key: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.http.ssl.certificate_authorities:
      - /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt

    xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.key: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.key
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate: /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/tls.crt
    xpack.security.transport.ssl.certificate_authorities:
      - /usr/share/elasticsearch/config/certs/ca.crt

Error from server (NotFound): configmaps "es-transform-config" not found

content.text: Let me determine whether the real cause is with our actual working cluster's transform, or if these newly-appeared `es-cluster`/`es-transform` resources are a separate red herring. I'll test by adding data to the source index and watching if the checkpoint advances.

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl -n elasticsearch get secret elastic-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "--- source index doc count ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/app-events/_count?pretty"
echo "--- index new doc ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" -X POST "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/app-events/_doc?refresh=true" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"@timestamp":"2026-07-10T01:12:00Z","service":"checkout"}'
echo
sleep 5
echo "--- transform stats after new doc ---"
kubectl -n elasticsearch exec curl-test -- curl -s --cacert /tmp/ca.crt -u "elastic:$PW" "https://es-http.elasticsearch.svc:9200/_transform/events-by-service/_stats?pretty" | grep -E "checkpoint|operations_behind|state|health"
